periods.objective: Classify sampling methods and identify bias in samples and survey questions.
periods.workedExamples: 8-1, Examples 1-3 — Classify a Random Sample; Identify Sample Bias; Identify Biased Questions
periods.notes: Sampling methods, bias, and survey-question quality.

dailyPhases.warmUp: Activate prior knowledge for 8a with one retrieval prompt tied to 8-1.
dailyPhases.conceptDevelopment: Use 8-1, Examples 1-3 — Classify a Random Sample; Identify Sample Bias; Identify Biased Questions to develop: Classify sampling methods and identify bias in samples and survey questions..
dailyPhases.guidedPractice: Students complete a scaffolded problem modeled on 8-1, Examples 1-3 — Classify a Random Sample; Identify Sample Bias; Identify Biased Questions; teacher checks notation and reasoning.
dailyPhases.independentPractice: Students complete aligned ALEKS/SRS practice: ALEKS M8-L8-1.01, ALEKS M8-L8-1.02, ALEKS M8-L8-1.04.
dailyPhases.assessment: Exit ticket: one fresh problem assessing 8a and one short explanation prompt.
dailyPhases.capReflection: CAP reflection: Name the strategy that helped you persist with classify sampling methods and identify bias in samples and survey questions..
